attributes.additional_details:
I believe housing asylum seekers in Sutton bridge Lincolnshire would pose high risk to the local population, we know that many of these asylum seekers are fighting aged men, often from violent backgrounds. They pose risk of violence and sexual risk to the men and women of our community. 

We have stretched public services in our area, stretched health care services, stretch police services and minimal transport infrastructure unless you are able to drive. In short we do not want them here
attributes.background:
I believe the proposed asylum accommodation in Sutton bridge, Lincolnshire, is not appropriate, we have minimal infrastructure around here, stretch community and health services. 

I believe they pose a high risk to the safety of our community. 

We dont not want asylum seekers housed here

rejection.details: We are not empowered to accept petitions on local matters.
